subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-02-15
subcodes.first_line: In this age the college which is dominated by a denominational spirit is an anomaly.... The universities and colleges of the world must hold fast to three cardinal principles
subcodes.subjects: @educational curricula, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @education of children; moral education, @universal education, @call to acquire knowledge; sciences, @universal peace; world unity, @unity; oneness of humanity
